text.title: Production TranscriptionService
text.summary: TranscriptionService provider routing rules, strategy selection logic, caching, and critical agent gotchas.

rule.statement: Route transcription requests by file size: under 5MB → direct API call; 5-25MB → standard TranscriptionService; over 25MB → LongAudioTranscriber chunking.
rule.rationale: Direct API calls avoid service initialization overhead for small files. Chunking is required above 25MB (Whisper API limit); standard service handles the middle range.

rule.statement: Cache transcription results keyed on a SHA-256 of the audio file bytes (not the filename). Re-transcribing identical audio wastes money.
rule.rationale: Filenames are reused across pipeline runs. Content hashing ensures the cache key is stable even when files are re-uploaded with the same name.

rule.statement: TranscriptionService._transcribe_local delegates to FasterWhisperTranscriber and LocalWhisper which are not defined in the base template — implement these before using the LOCAL and FASTER_WHISPER providers.
rule.rationale: The template references these classes but does not define them. Calling the service with these providers will raise NameError at runtime without custom implementations.

rule.statement: word_timestamps=True requires response_format="verbose_json". The template sets this correctly, but response.words uses getattr with None default — validate that word timestamps are present before using them downstream.
rule.rationale: getattr with None default means missing word timestamps fail silently. Downstream subtitle or search-index generation will break without an explicit presence check.

section.title: Format support

rule.statement: The default supported_formats list does not include .ogg. Add it or convert .ogg to .mp3 before calling TranscriptionService.
rule.rationale: .ogg is common in web recording APIs (MediaRecorder default). Without explicit support, the service raises ValueError and the audio is lost.

list.item: Use language parameter when language is known — auto-detect adds ~1s latency and misidentifies short clips.
Whisper output is not punctuated on all audio types — downstream agents must not assume sentence structure in raw transcripts.
Groq Whisper uses the same API format as OpenAI but has stricter size limits — test before routing production traffic.

section.reference: Agent task prompt for transcription subagent
